summary.en: AI-powered background-check platform that helps companies screen and hire workers faster and more fairly.
summary.zh: 以 AI 驅動的背景調查平台，協助企業更快速、更公平地篩選與聘用員工。

highlight.en: A YC Summer 2014 standout, Checkr modernized the slow, manual background-check industry and became HR-tech infrastructure for the gig economy. It reached a $4.6B valuation in its 2022 Series E, raising $550M+ in total.
highlight.zh: 身為 YC 2014 夏季梯隊的代表，Checkr 革新了緩慢且仰賴人工的背景調查產業，成為零工經濟的 HR 科技基礎設施。公司在 2022 年 E 輪達到 46 億美元估值，累計募資超過 5.5 億美元。

funding.zh: 估值約 46 億美元（2022 年 E 輪）；累計募資逾 5.5 億美元

sources.title: Checkr Raises $250 Million at $4.6 Billion Valuation
Checkr Business Breakdown & Founding Story | Contrary Research

summary.en: Synthetic-biology company that designs custom microbes and runs automated foundries to make biology easier to engineer.
summary.zh: 合成生物學公司，設計客製化微生物並營運自動化代工廠，讓生物工程變得更容易。

highlight.en: Founded by five MIT scientists, Ginkgo became the flagship synthetic-biology bet of its YC class and went public via SPAC in 2021 at a ~$15B valuation. Shares have since slumped, leaving a market cap under $1B by 2026.
highlight.zh: 由五位 MIT 科學家創立，Ginkgo 成為 YC 同梯中合成生物學的旗艦押注，並於 2021 年透過 SPAC 上市，估值約 150 億美元。此後股價大幅下跌，到 2026 年市值已不足 10 億美元。

funding.en: IPO'd via SPAC in 2021 at ~$15B; market cap fell below $1B by 2026
funding.zh: 2021 年透過 SPAC 上市，估值約 150 億美元；至 2026 年市值已跌破 10 億美元

founders: Jason Kelly, Reshma Shetty, Barry Canton, Austin Che, Tom Knight

sources.title: Is Ginkgo's synthetic biology story worth $15 billion? | MIT Technology Review
Ginkgo Bioworks (DNA) Market Cap & Net Worth

summary.en: On-demand lawn-care marketplace that uses satellite imagery to quote and book yard services in minutes.
summary.zh: 隨選草坪養護媒合平台，利用衛星影像在數分鐘內報價並預約庭院服務。

highlight.en: Lawn Love built a software layer over the fragmented, low-tech lawn-care market, generating instant quotes from satellite data instead of in-person estimates. It was acquired by rival LawnStarter in 2021.
highlight.zh: Lawn Love 在零碎且低科技的草坪養護市場上打造了一層軟體，以衛星資料即時報價，取代到府估價。公司於 2021 年被競爭對手 LawnStarter 收購。

funding.zh: 2021 年被 LawnStarter 收購（金額未公開）

sources.title: LawnStarter - Wikipedia

summary.en: Government-affairs software that tracks bills, meetings, reports and mentions as a system of record for lobbyists.
summary.zh: 政府事務軟體，追蹤法案、會議、報告與輿情，作為遊說人員的紀錄系統。

highlight.en: GovPredict brought big-data tooling to the lobbying and public-affairs world, helping teams keep every bill and mention at their fingertips. It was acquired by Phone2Action in 2020.
highlight.zh: GovPredict 將大數據工具引入遊說與公共事務領域，協助團隊隨手掌握每一項法案與輿情。公司於 2020 年被 Phone2Action 收購。

funding.zh: 2020 年被 Phone2Action 收購（金額未公開）

sources.title: Phone2Action Acquires GovPredict

summary.en: Maker of Bitcoin ATM hardware and software that lets people convert cash into crypto.
summary.zh: 比特幣 ATM 軟硬體製造商，讓人們將現金兌換成加密貨幣。

highlight.en: An early YC crypto bet, Bitaccess built one of the largest Bitcoin ATM networks, processing over $1B of cash-to-Bitcoin conversions. Bitcoin Depot acquired a majority interest in the company in 2022.
highlight.zh: 身為 YC 早期的加密押注，Bitaccess 打造了規模最大的比特幣 ATM 網路之一，處理超過 10 億美元的現金轉比特幣交易。Bitcoin Depot 於 2022 年收購了公司多數股權。

funding.en: Bitcoin Depot acquired majority interest in 2022; network processed $1B+ in conversions
funding.zh: Bitcoin Depot 於 2022 年收購多數股權；網路累計處理逾 10 億美元兌換

founders: Moe Adham, Haseeb Awan, Vignesh Sundaresan, Ryan Wallace

sources.title: Bitcoin Depot Announces Acquisition of Majority Interest in Bitaccess

summary.en: Full-stack quantum computing company building superconducting QPUs available through its cloud platform.
summary.zh: 全堆疊量子運算公司，打造超導量子處理器，並透過其雲端平台提供使用。

highlight.en: Founded by physicist Chad Rigetti, the company is one of YC's boldest deep-tech bets and went public via SPAC in 2022. After a 2025 quantum-stock rally, RGTI's market cap reached roughly $7B.
highlight.zh: 由物理學家 Chad Rigetti 創立，是 YC 最大膽的深科技押注之一，並於 2022 年透過 SPAC 上市。歷經 2025 年量子股大漲後，RGTI 市值來到約 70 億美元。

funding.zh: 已上市（Nasdaq: RGTI）；2026 年市值約 70 億美元

sources.title: Rigetti Computing (RGTI) - Market capitalization
Rigetti Computing (RGTI) Stock Price & Overview

summary.en: Advanced-fission company developing small modular reactors for emission-free, always-on power.
summary.zh: 先進核分裂公司，開發小型模組化反應爐，提供零排放、全天候的電力。

highlight.en: A standout YC deep-tech and clean-energy bet, Oklo went public in 2024 via Sam Altman's SPAC and is seen as a key AI-data-center power play. The pre-revenue developer carried a market cap around $10B in 2026.
highlight.zh: 身為 YC 深科技與潔淨能源的代表押注，Oklo 於 2024 年透過 Sam Altman 的 SPAC 上市，被視為 AI 資料中心供電的關鍵題材。這家尚未產生營收的開發商在 2026 年市值約 100 億美元。

funding.en: Public (NYSE: OKLO); market cap ~$10B in 2026; pre-revenue
funding.zh: 已上市（NYSE: OKLO）；2026 年市值約 100 億美元；尚未產生營收

sources.title: Oklo (NYSE:OKLO) - Stock Analysis - Simply Wall St
Oklo Stock Analysis: Sam Altman-backed SMR Bet

summary.en: Identity-verification service that confirms a user's identity starting from just their phone number.
summary.zh: 身分驗證服務，僅需用戶的電話號碼即可確認其身分。

highlight.en: Cognito reduced onboarding friction by verifying name, address and SSN from a phone number, making it a high-converting KYC tool. Fintech leader Plaid acquired it for $250M in early 2022.
highlight.zh: Cognito 僅憑電話號碼即可驗證姓名、地址與社會安全碼，降低開戶摩擦，成為高轉換率的 KYC 工具。金融科技龍頭 Plaid 於 2022 年初以 2.5 億美元收購。

funding.zh: 2022 年被 Plaid 以 2.5 億美元收購

sources.title: Plaid acquires ID verification platform Cognito
Identity verification platform Cognito is joining Plaid | Plaid

summary.en: Global fulfillment and supply-chain platform giving ecommerce brands Amazon-level logistics and software.
summary.zh: 全球履約與供應鏈平台，為電商品牌提供 Amazon 等級的物流與軟體。

highlight.en: ShipBob brought tech-driven fulfillment to SMB ecommerce through a network of 50+ fulfillment centers and its own warehouse software. A 2021 Series E led by Bain Capital Ventures pushed its valuation past $1B.
highlight.zh: ShipBob 透過 50 多個履約中心與自有倉儲軟體，為中小型電商帶來科技驅動的履約服務。2021 年由 Bain Capital Ventures 領投的 E 輪將其估值推升至超過 10 億美元。

funding.en: Valued >$1B (2021 Series E); raised ~$330M, $200M from Bain-led Series E
funding.zh: 估值逾 10 億美元（2021 年 E 輪）；累計募資約 3.3 億美元，其中 E 輪 2 億美元由 Bain 領投

sources.title: ShipBob Raises $200 Million, Valuing the Platform Well Over $1 Billion
ShipBob reaches $1B valuation with new funding round - FreightWaves

summary.en: Cloud platform for construction offering equipment rental, fleet-tracking software and jobsite hardware.
summary.zh: 建築業雲端平台，提供設備租賃、車隊追蹤軟體與工地硬體。

highlight.en: Founded by brothers Willy and Jabbok Schlacks, EquipmentShare grew from a peer-to-peer marketplace into a major construction-tech and rental player. It IPO'd on Nasdaq in January 2026, raising ~$747M at a first-day market value of about $8B.
highlight.zh: 由 Willy 與 Jabbok Schlacks 兄弟創立，EquipmentShare 從點對點媒合平台成長為建築科技與租賃領域的要角。公司於 2026 年 1 月在 Nasdaq 上市，募資約 7.47 億美元，上市首日市值約 80 億美元。

funding.en: IPO'd on Nasdaq (EQPT) Jan 2026, raising ~$747M; first-day market value ~$8B
funding.zh: 2026 年 1 月於 Nasdaq 上市（EQPT），募資約 7.47 億美元；首日市值約 80 億美元

sources.title: EquipmentShare.com Plans $747 Million IPO, Valuation Exceeds $6.7 Billion
EquipmentShare revenue, valuation & funding | Sacra

summary.en: AI-powered ecommerce and software platform digitizing the American food supply chain.
summary.zh: 以 AI 驅動的電商與軟體平台，數位化美國食品供應鏈。

highlight.en: GrubMarket transformed the offline, manual food-distribution industry into a software-driven business and became the largest private US food-tech company. A 2026 Series H valued it at $4.5B on revenue surpassing $2B.
highlight.zh: GrubMarket 將離線、仰賴人工的食品配銷產業轉型為軟體驅動的事業，並成為美國規模最大的私營食品科技公司。2026 年 H 輪使其估值達 45 億美元，營收突破 20 億美元。

funding.en: Valued ~$4.5B (2026 Series H); revenue surpassed $2B in 2024
funding.zh: 估值約 45 億美元（2026 年 H 輪）；2024 年營收突破 20 億美元

sources.title: GrubMarket raises $50M at a $3.5B valuation | TechCrunch
GrubMarket Raises $50M Series H at $4.5B valuation - Tech Startups

summary.en: India's full-stack fintech offering payments and banking solutions for businesses.
summary.zh: 印度全堆疊金融科技公司，為企業提供支付與銀行解決方案。

highlight.en: Razorpay grew from a single payment gateway into India's leading full-stack financial platform and a barometer of the country's digital economy. Last valued at ~$9.2B, it processes over $180B in annualized transaction volume.
highlight.zh: Razorpay 從單一支付閘道成長為印度領先的全堆疊金融平台，並成為該國數位經濟的風向球。最新估值約 92 億美元，年化交易量超過 1,800 億美元。

funding.en: Last valued ~$9.2B; raised ~$742M; >$180B annualized transaction volume
funding.zh: 最新估值約 92 億美元；累計募資約 7.42 億美元；年化交易量逾 1,800 億美元

sources.title: Razorpay - 2026 Company Profile, Funding & Financials - Tracxn
Razorpay CEO Harshil Mathur on Building a Payments Platform | Y Combinator
